data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"21:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nAll on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.\\nDo not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.\\nRole: cover.\\nImage grammar: hook_cover.\\nPurpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..\\nDiagram type: stage_evolution.\\nConcept summary: Mamba-3 这次最关键的变化，不是再讲训练提速，而是把注意力从“怎么更快预训练”转向“怎么在不加推理延迟的前提下，把质量继续往上推”。.\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure.\\nKey relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance.\\nLayout pattern: diagram_left_text_right.\\nDiagram focus: single central system diagram.\\nText position: right.\\nText budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.\\nHeadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.\\nSubheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.\\nLabel budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.\\nLabel count budget: <= 4 labels.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"重写推理的账本\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"不是Mamba 又更新了\\\".\\nGrammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects.\\nAdditional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: Gorden_Sun.\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\\nDo not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
